meta.title: Leonardo Marques - Motorsport Engineer & Sim Racer
meta.description: Leonardo 'Leo' Marques - Motorsport Engineer specializing in performance data, trackside engineering, and sim racing. Porsche Cup, GT4, Ferrari Challenge.

hero.role: Motorsport Engineer - Performance & Data - Sim Racer

cards.title: Trackside Engineering
cards.description: On-site race engineering covering setup direction, run plans, tyre strategy, and real-time radio communication to maximize every session.

cards.title: Data & Driver Development
cards.description: Deep telemetry analysis, stint breakdowns, sector comparisons, and structured debriefs that translate numbers into actionable driving improvements.

cards.title: Simulation & Remote Support
cards.description: Pre-event track preparation via sim platforms, setup correlation, remote data review, and driver coaching between race weekends.

entries.title: Porsche Carrera Cup
bullets: Developed session-specific run plans and qualifying strategies
Managed setup direction across mechanical and aero platforms
Optimized tyre pressure windows and compound allocation
Delivered post-session telemetry and video debriefs
Coordinated real-time radio strategy during races

entries.title: Aston Martin GT4
bullets: Led data acquisition and analysis for multi-driver lineups
Designed stint strategies for endurance-format rounds
Provided driver-specific coaching via sector-level comparisons
Built setup change matrices for varying track conditions

entries.title: Ferrari Challenge
bullets: Processed and analyzed onboard telemetry across practice, qualifying, and race
Produced tyre degradation models to guide pit-stop timing
Supported driver development with structured video review sessions
Collaborated with team on damper and ride-height adjustments
Delivered debrief reports within 30 minutes of each session

points.title: Pre-Event Preparation
points.text: Every race weekend starts in the sim. I learn circuits corner by corner, test setup baselines, and develop reference laps before the car even hits the track.

points.title: Racecraft & Strategy
points.text: Sim racing sharpens decision-making under pressure - overtaking windows, tyre management, and fuel strategy all transfer directly to real-world performance.

points.title: Data Correlation
points.text: Comparing sim telemetry against real-car data helps validate setup changes and identify areas where the driver can extract more pace.

quotes.text: Leo's data analysis and debrief sessions completely transformed my approach to qualifying. I found over half a second within two weekends.
quotes.author: GT4 Driver

quotes.text: Having an engineer who understands both the real car and the sim is a rare advantage. Leo bridges that gap better than anyone I've worked with.
quotes.author: Porsche Cup Competitor

form.success: Thanks for reaching out! I will get back to you soon.
